calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-09-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-21-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER ANTHONY FERREIRO Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed and proposed judgment.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
